title: Define redacted operator outcome export contract
goal: Define the Chronik-owned redacted operator outcome event/export shape that can transport Grabowski receipts to heimlern without raw logs, secrets or routing authority.

acceptance.assertion: The contract states Chronik owns historical transport while heimlern owns only offline analysis/proposal output.
The export shape excludes secrets and raw logs while preserving route, outcome, reward, source, freshness and digest evidence.
At least one fixture or sample export validates the intended shape without claiming production sample sufficiency.

metadata.source_decision: Chronik selected as primary integration organ for heimlern because it owns append-only historical outcomes.
